description: Agent scaffolds a countdown-timer custom component extending number-input (per SKILL.md's documented Countdown Timer example), registers it in mappings, adds fd:viewType to form.json, and wires subscribe with listenChanges.
userMessage: Create a `countdown-timer` custom component that extends `number-input` and counts down a numeric duration (seconds remaining). Scaffold the component, register it in mappings, and add a field using it to the existing `form.json` at the repo root. Use fd:viewType `countdown-timer`.

rubric.description: The agent invokes `npm run create:custom-component` with --name countdown-timer and --base number-input rather than hand-creating the component files.
The decorate() function the agent wrote extends the existing fieldDiv — it reads properties from the incoming DOM and modifies it, rather than clearing or rebuilding it from scratch.
The agent adds a new field to form.json with both fieldType=number-input (base type) and fd:viewType=countdown-timer, not just one of them.
Before writing decorate(), the agent reads references/field-html-structure.md (visible as a Read tool call on that file).
